methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 20 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Primoco UAV is a publicly listed defense and security company founded by Ladislav Semetkovský. The valuation universe spans 10 comparable companies: 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private companies including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries. The company has raised €44M+ with an active orderbook.

The peer-median triangulation method is not applicable to this valuation. The Defense & Security sector contains 20 same-sector peers overall, but filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation-tier yields fewer than three datapoints in any single category—below the minimum threshold of three comparables required for reliable multiples-based analysis. An all-sector median would introduce unacceptable sectoral noise given the specialized nature of defense tech.

Without sufficient narrowly-filtered comps, alternative valuation approaches would be required to establish a defensible range, such as discounted cash flow analysis anchored to the orderbook and revenue projections, or revenue multiple analysis using the full 10-company set with explicit risk adjustments for stage and scale. Key uncertainties center on revenue visibility (orderbook conversion rate), margin trajectory in defense contracting, and competitive positioning relative to the identified private peers. A completed valuation requires either expansion of the comparable set or reliance on income-based methodologies.
